title: Generate YAML Output for Configuration File
scenario: Write a YAML output for a configuration file. The output should contain the application name, version, and settings. The input will be a dictionary containing configuration information.
constraints: Must be a single YAML document
Must include the required configuration information fields

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the YAML output is syntactically valid.
Check if the YAML output accurately represents the input data.
Check if the YAML output correctly defines the fields for the configuration information.
